---
title: "Current Projects"
---

::::: {style="display: flex; gap: 20px;"}
::: {style="flex: 1; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; background-color: #f9f9f9;"}
### [OkStupid](https://google.com){target="_blank"}

OK Stupid data dashboard link above;

write brief description + outline content here
:::

::: {style="flex: 1; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; background-color: #f9f9f9;"}
### [ICE/CBP Deaths](https://google.com){target="_blank"}

ICE/CBP Shootings and Detention Center Deaths Dataset {in progress}

write brief description + outline content here
:::
:::::
